name: Greek Gyros
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Chopped fresh oregano or 1 tsp Chopped fresh marjoram
2 Spanish onions; thinly sliced into rings
24 small Romaine lettuce leaves; washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add lemon juice, garlic, thyme, oregano/marjoram, pepper, onions, lettuce, and tomatoes to the pan.
4. Cook until the vegetables are tender and the spices have melded together.
5. Serve on warm pita bread with additional toppings as desired.
